Recommendations.Description: Strategy 'LancerDual' is dominant with 94% aggregate win rate.
Evidence: Wins 94% of all matchups against other strategies.
Recommendations.Rationale: A healthy metagame requires that no single strategy dominates all others. Examine which units this strategy relies on and consider increasing their cost or reducing their stats.

Recommendations.Description: Strategy 'LancerDual' has no counter — beats 15 strategies, loses to none.
Evidence: Beats: AllSpend, ArcherMonkSpend, ArcherRush, ArcherTurtle, LancerMonkSpend, LancerRush, LancerTurtle, MixedDual, MixedRush, MixedTurtle, PawnGather, PawnIdle, WarriorMonkSpend, WarriorRush, WarriorTurtle
No strategy achieves >60% win rate against this agent.
Recommendations.Rationale: Every strategy should have at least one viable counter for healthy metagame diversity.

Recommendations.Rationale: Increasing WARRIOR cost by 15% would reduce its cost efficiency without changing combat feel.
